overall.description: A first-person walk through the foggy industrial docks of Saint Denis in Red Dead Redemption 2. The player moves steadily past wooden crates and cargo, passing two NPCs conversing near a brick warehouse building with a 'SEEDS & FEED' sign, while industrial smokestacks loom in the misty background.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock platform with industrial cargo storage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock toward the warehouse district, approaching two men standing ahead

notable_agents.action: two men leaning against a wooden shed wall, engaged in conversation

entered.detail: large dark wooden barrel sitting on the dock planks
metal archway with 'SAINT DENIS' lettering spanning the dock entrance
tall wooden plank fence running along the left side of the dock
two-story red brick industrial building with tall windows
tall factory smokestacks emitting smoke visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy wooden dock with a large barrel on the right and the Saint Denis arch visible in the distance. The camera moves forward past industrial fencing toward two men standing against a shed, with brick warehouses and smokestacks looming in the misty background.

scene_state.functional_zone: dock cargo area with stacked shipping crates

events.description: passing closely by the two men standing against the shed wall

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the two men, moving toward the stacked cargo in the center of the dock

notable_agents.action: man in vest with hands on hips, turning to watch the player pass
man in dark clothing leaning against the shed with arms crossed

entered.detail: stack of large wooden shipping crates marked with X symbols
row of large cylindrical burlap sacks in front of the crates
small wooden shed structure where the men are standing

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the two men standing by the wooden shed, revealing stacked shipping crates and burlap sacks in the center of the dock. The Saint Denis sign recedes to the left as the brick warehouse ahead becomes more prominent in the golden morning fog.

agents.ego_description: approaching the warehouse entrance with the 'SEEDS & FEED' sign, moving past the stacked cargo

entered.detail: large wooden warehouse door with metal framing at ground level
white painted sign reading 'SEEDS & FEED' mounted above the warehouse door

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the warehouse entrance, with the 'SEEDS & FEED' sign now clearly visible above the door. The stacked crates and burlap sacks fill the foreground as the industrial fence and Saint Denis sign fade into the fog behind, creating an enclosed feeling near the building facade.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy industrial dock that gradually closes in on a brick warehouse facade. It begins on a wooden pier beside a large barrel, moving past industrial fencing toward two men standing by a shed while the Saint Denis arch remains visible in the distance. As the camera passes the men, the perspective shifts toward stacked shipping crates and burlap sacks, causing the distant city sign to recede to the left while the golden morning fog illuminates the brick warehouse ahead. The scene then narrows as the camera approaches the building entrance, bringing the SEEDS & FEED sign into clear focus. Finally, the industrial fence and distant landmarks fade into the mist, leaving the viewer enclosed by the crates and the warehouse wall.
